tasks.subject: Task 1: Clean slate + Jekyll skeleton
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove all academicpages files and stand up an empty-but-building bespoke Jekyll skeleton.

**Plan:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-06-jekyll-port.md Task 1 (complete code for every file).

**Files:**
- Delete: every tracked file except CLAUDE.md, docs/, .gitignore
- Create: .gitignore (replace), Gemfile, _config.yml, _layouts/{default,home,single}.html, _includes/{head,header,footer,paper-entry,author-list}.html, 404.html

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] bundle exec jekyll build exits 0 with zero warnings
- [ ] Zero plugins; hand-written title + meta description in head.html
- [ ] No <script anywhere in _site/ output - absolute
- [ ] git status clean after commit (Hugo leftovers ignored or removed)

**Verify:** bundle exec jekyll build && grep -ri '<script' _site/ ; echo exit=$? -> build succeeds, grep finds nothing (exit=1)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["_config.yml", "Gemfile", ".gitignore", "_layouts/", "_includes/", "404.html"], "verifyCommand": "bundle exec jekyll build && ! grep -rqi '<script' _site/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["builds clean zero warnings", "zero plugins", "zero script tags absolute", "clean git status"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Port content from fd98409
tasks.description:
**Goal:** All 12 papers, 2 courses, 4 pages, headshot, and favicon in place with corrected links.

**Plan:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-06-jekyll-port.md Task 2 (complete file contents for all content files - do not improvise).

**Files:**
- Create: _papers/*.md (12), _courses/ai-finance.md, _courses/competitive-strategy.md, index.md, research.md, teaching.md, fun.md, assets/picture.jpg, assets/favicon.svg

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] 12 papers, category counts: working=6, published=5, other=1
- [ ] Bio is the approved Assistant Professor version
- [ ] Teaching links to live ai-finance course site; TA history dropped; courses have no individual pages
- [ ] selected: true on exactly profit-puzzles and markups-markdowns
- [ ] Three formerly-# links carry real URLs (beginning-of-trend -> SSRN 4362776, production-approach -> DOI 10.1016/j.econlet.2022.110673, biden-labor-competition -> ProMarket 2022/03/25)
- [ ] Headshot is a real photo (visually verified, not a placeholder), saved via sips as JPEG; if the googleusercontent URL fails, STOP and ask James

**Verify:** bundle exec jekyll build && ls _site/papers | wc -l -> 12; grep -c paper-entry _site/research/index.html -> 12; homepage 2 entries; teaching 2 course entries

```json:metadata
{"files": ["_papers/", "_courses/", "index.md", "research.md", "teaching.md", "fun.md", "assets/picture.jpg", "assets/favicon.svg"], "verifyCommand": "bundle exec jekyll build && [ $(ls _site/papers | wc -l) -eq 12 ]", "acceptanceCriteria": ["12 papers grouped 6/5/1", "approved bio", "live course link no TA history", "2 selected papers", "3 placeholder links fixed", "real headshot acquired"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Stylesheet
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Single assets/css/main.scss implementing the design system: compact hero, PaperMod-derived look, site-local tokens.

**Plan:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-06-jekyll-port.md Task 3 (complete stylesheet - copy verbatim).

**Files:**
- Create: assets/css/main.scss

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Site-local CSS custom properties (--gap, --radius, --border, etc.)
- [ ] Compact hero (no full-viewport min-height), 0.15s ease transitions, 10px/16px buttons, 4px/8px radii, #2563eb prose links, letter-spacing on uppercase
- [ ] Light theme only, system font stack, no webfonts, no imports

**Verify:** bundle exec jekyll build && test -f _site/assets/css/main.css && grep -c '0.15s ease' _site/assets/css/main.css -> file exists, count >= 1

```json:metadata
{"files": ["assets/css/main.scss"], "verifyCommand": "bundle exec jekyll build && test -f _site/assets/css/main.css", "acceptanceCriteria": ["site-local tokens", "design system values", "light only no webfonts no imports"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Local verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Captured evidence the site is correct: visual review, link check, invariants.

**Plan:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-06-jekyll-port.md Task 4 (exact commands).

**Files:** none created (screenshots go to the session, not the repo)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] jekyll serve renders all pages without errors
- [ ] Screenshots reviewed at 1280px and 390px for: home, research, teaching, fun, papers/markups-markdowns
- [ ] Every external link in _site/ returns a non-error HTTP status (SSRN may 403 curl - verify those in the Playwright browser instead, then treat as pass)
- [ ] All external/PDF links carry target=_blank; zero <script in output

**Verify:** link-check loop output shows no 404/410/5xx; screenshots visually match design rules (compact hero, blue prose links, no horizontal scroll at 390px)

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "see plan Task 4 step 3 link-check loop", "acceptanceCriteria": ["clean serve", "10 screenshots reviewed", "all links pass or SSRN browser-verified", "new-tab behavior", "zero script tags"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Rewrite CLAUDE.md for the Jekyll stack
tasks.description:
**Goal:** CLAUDE.md describes the site as it now exists - Jekyll, native Pages, zero plugins - with no Hugo or PaperMod references.

**Plan:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-06-jekyll-port.md Task 5 (complete replacement content - copy verbatim).

**Files:**
- Modify: CLAUDE.md (full replacement)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] grep -in 'hugo|papermod' CLAUDE.md returns ONLY the one hugo-migration branch-name line in Technical Stack (content provenance)
- [ ] Deployment section describes push-to-build
- [ ] Voice rules unchanged; design values unchanged (reworded as site tokens)

**Verify:** grep -in 'hugo\|papermod' CLAUDE.md -> exactly 1 line, containing hugo-migration

```json:metadata
{"files": ["CLAUDE.md"], "verifyCommand": "[ $(grep -ci 'hugo\\|papermod' CLAUDE.md) -eq 1 ] && grep -qi 'hugo-migration' CLAUDE.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["stack rewritten for Jekyll", "deploy rewritten push-to-build", "only provenance hugo mention", "voice and design values preserved"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Ship
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New site live at https://james-traina.github.io.

**Plan:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-06-jekyll-port.md Task 6.

**Files:** none (git operations only)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] CONFIRM WITH JAMES before pushing - this replaces the live site (AskUserQuestion, point of no return)
- [ ] jekyll-port fast-forward merged to master and pushed
- [ ] hugo-migration pushed to origin (durable remote ref for fd98409) and RETAINED - do not delete
- [ ] GitHub Pages build status built
- [ ] Live site spot-checked: homepage hero + 2 selected papers; /research/ shows 12 papers; one paper page returns 200

**Verify:** curl -s https://james-traina.github.io/ | grep -c profile-photo -> 1 (after build; allow CDN propagation retries)

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "gh api repos/James-Traina/James-Traina.github.io/pages/builds/latest --jq '.status'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["user confirmed push", "ff merge pushed", "hugo-migration pushed and retained", "pages build green", "live spot-checks pass"]}
```
